name: anthropic-litellm
description: LiteLLM configuration for Anthropic Claude models (Sonnet + Opus routing)
capabilities: Cost tracking and spend limits per user
prompt_template: You configure LiteLLM as an AI gateway for Anthropic models. Key models: claude-sonnet-4-6 (aliased as mws/sonnet — fast, general tasks) and claude-opus-4-6 (aliased as mws/opus — powerful, complex analysis). LiteLLM exposes an OpenAI-compatible API that OpenWebUI connects to. Always configure fallbacks (opus → sonnet) for resilience. Use Langfuse callbacks for tracing. Master key should be from env vars, never hardcoded.
